phrases.You will delete the log of user's past b: You will delete the log of user's past bookings. It is usually a better idea to BLOCK the user.

phrases.The seat is available to be booked on th: The seat is available to be booked on the selected dates and time.
phrases.The seat is available, but you have anot: The seat is available, but you have another booking at that time which will be automatically updated.
phrases.The seat is assigned to you and availabl: The seat is assigned to you and available to be booked.
The seat is assigned to you and available, but you have another booking at that time which will be automatically updated.
phrases.The seat is booked by you exactly on the: The seat is booked by you exactly on the selected date and time.
phrases.The seat is booked by you, but not exact: The seat is booked by you, but not exactly on the selected date or time. You can update; other reservations at that time will be automatically updated.
phrases.The seat is booked by someone else or no: The seat is booked by someone else or not available for booking.
phrases.The seat is not available for booking: n: The seat is not available for booking: no dates selected, disabled, or view-only zone.
phrases.The seat is assigned to some people but: The seat is assigned to some people but currently not booked.
phrases.Seat is successfully disabled.<br>Howeve:
Seat is successfully disabled.
However there are existing reservations in the the next few weeks. Existing reservations are not automatically removed, it has to be done manually.
phrases.Seat is successfully assigned.<br>Howeve:
Seat is successfully assigned.
However there are non-assignees' existing reservations in the the next few weeks. Existing reservations are not automatically removed, it has to be done manually.

phrases.updated data of %{smart_count} seat(s): updated data of a seat||||updated data of %{smart_count} seats

seatEdit.Transform hint: Drag the frame to move all seats. Use corner and edge grips to resize, and the rotate grip to rotate. The selected seat is the anchor.
seatEdit.Add mode hint: Click on the map to add a new seat in the selected zone.
seatEdit.Map edit hint: Seat icons are shown as a reference for all available sprites.
seatEdit.Map filter hint: Switch to dark mode to see the result.

All unsaved changes will be lost.
phrases.More than %{smart_count} rows are select: More than one row is selected. Report will be limited to that number of rows.||||More than %{smart_count} rows are selected. Report will be limited to that number of rows.
phrases.Some reservations are outside the new bo: Some reservations are outside the new booking window and must be removed manually.

phrases.Today if before start time, otherwise to: Today if before start time, otherwise tomorrow
phrases.Regenerating the URL will invalidate you: Regenerating the URL will invalidate your current calendar subscription link. Continue?

phrases.Select a zone to reassign seats to, or u: Select a zone to reassign seats to, or use the button below to delete the seats without reassignment.
phrases.No other zones exist. You may only delet: No other zones exist. You may only delete the seats along with this zone.

phrases.This will remove the seats and all their: This will remove the seats and all their past booking history. This cannot be undone.
